reviews.comment: Frederick Window Tinting does an outstanding job and provides great customer service! I would highly recommend FWT!

I thank you Frederick window tinting.

reviews.comment: Wonderful customer service, I was a winner of their #20days until spring giveaway so i had a $50 gift certificate, they were very easy to communicate with and set up an appointment to tint my 2017 Chevy Impala. Work was done on time in the time they quoted, great family run business, explained everything to me including warranty, what to expect and walked me around the car before and after. I would totally recommend this company to anybody who loves their car and is in need of tint!! Thank you Frederick Window Tinting!!!

reviewReply.comment:
We find it odd when someone is personally friends with the owner of a competing shop and than comes to us. We did the best we could to give you a 5* experience.

We ran a promotion for a discounted price during the colder months. Despite your vehicle not qualifying, we gave you the $75 discount. We set up the appointment for you and despite you replying to our confirmation message saying you would be there, you were a NO CALL NO SHOW. Even with that, we still accommodated your schedule and brought you in the following day after you contacted us well past your appointment time. We had your film shade recorded and you changed your mind four times. No big deal, but you sent me multiple text messages all night long from 12:30am until almost 5am.

After picking up your vehicle, you mentioned a sliver of light that was visible from the inside. It doesn't show on the outside, but to avoid the sliver of light, door panels would need to be removed. We told you that on a 15 year old vehicle, we were not going to disassemble your car, as we didn't want the liability of damaging an aged vehicle. You told us that our answer was "unacceptable" to you; so we offered to remove the film and refund your money. You told us that you didn't want the film removed and a refund, you still wanted the tint. I asked you to stop by at your convenience and we would take a look at it. You told me you would come after work and than later on said you would come after the holidays.

We never heard from you after that and you left this review eight months later. We did everything we could to try and give you a great experience, I wish you would have followed up on your end regarding coming in prior to leaving this review.
We appreciate your review, thank you!

reviews.comment: I took our 2019 Mercedes CLA 250 to FWT and not only did they do a fantastic job on our car but they made me feel at home. I highly recommend this small business .
reviews.name: accounts/114723450049664810853/locations/10123051285004451502/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvcThqUWZnEAE

reviews.comment: Just went in this morning to get our new truck tinted by Joe. This is actually the 4th vehicle we've had Joe tint over the years...What has it been 5-6 years since I first set foot in their tiny one-car rental garage in Germantown? He's moved up to a baller shop in Frederick and I don't know what I can say that hasn't already been said, so I'll just say it again: he's talented, friendly, and his pricing is totally fair. I wouldn't go anywhere else to get my car tinted. Bottom line is he is THE BEST.

reviewReply.comment: We appreciate your review, thank you!
